title: Starlight & Delight
description: Mine new ores, craft new tools/weapons and eat lots of foods! :)
body:
![Minecraft-Style render for the name of the mod that says "Starlight & Delight"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a977a7367ce64fb3dd18cb89a1b9f2d7ea4b11aa.png)
  
## This mod adds 2 new ores and new foods :) 

Adds 2 new ores: 

1. Pink Garnet:
This includes tools, a full armor set and the Pink Garnet block and its variants + other items

2. Starlight Fragment:
Starlight Tools, Armor and Weapons

![Starlight Armor with Starlight Sword Right-Click Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0313f31884d4de327ca8f3743670865bae7c7a68.png)
![Tomahawks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f0496ceb425ef77b30c140c5687ff4bc1a284d7.png)

It also adds new foods:

![Some of the new foods (Cauliflower, Sweet Berries Pie, Cheese)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89d837195bcab896d06a9260f825c388c8905a6.png)

![New Fermenter Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e550f102cd6ee0ed0965550580a276eb47987ec.png)
